name: Barley Risotto with Roasted Tomatoes and Nico
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup chicken stock, homemade or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Place halved tomatoes, cut-side up, on a baking sheet. Dry the tomatoes in the oven until shriveled but still juicy, not hard and dry, about 2 hours. Let cool and then cut into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. In a medium saucepan, bring water and stock to a boil. Remove from heat and keep covered.
4. In another medium saucepan, heat olive oil over moderate heat. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until translucent, about 5 minutes.
5. Add barley and stir to coat. Add about a third of the hot stock mixture and cook at a gentle boil, stirring occasionally, until absorbed. Add another third of the stock and cook, stirring frequently, until absorbed. Add remaining stock and salt and cook, stirring frequently, until barley is tender, about 1 hour and 15 minutes total cooking time.
6. Stir barley vigorously to make texture creamier. If dry, add more water. Stir in butter, Parmesan, heavy cream (if using), and three-quarters of both tomatoes and olives. Serve barley risotto topped with remaining tomatoes and
